description: Perform a manual ARCH-LM test for volatility clustering on the 'inf' variable in the loaded usa.gdt dataset. Calculate the LM test statistic (T * R-squared) and p-value (1 degree of freedom) using an auxiliary regression of squared residuals from an AR(1) model of 'inf'. Save the Gretl script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/arch_test_script.inp and a text file containing the auxiliary regression output, LM statistic, and p-value to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/arch_test_results.txt.
